name: Leeks in Dilled Lemon Butter
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon chopped fresh dillweed, or 1 tsp. dry dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove roots from leeks and keep 4 inches of dark green leaves.
2. Cut leeks in half lengthwise.
3. Wash leeks thoroughly.
4. Combine leeks and chicken broth in a 12x8-inch pan. Cover with plastic wrap.
5. Microwave on High for 8-10 minutes until tender, rearranging after 4 minutes.
6. Drain the mixture and set aside.
7. In a glass measuring cup, melt 1/4 cup margarine. Add lemon juice, dill, and white pepper.
8. Pour the melted butter mixture over the leeks.
9. Toss gently to combine.
10. Cover and microwave on High for 1-2 minutes to heat through. Serve immediately.
